name: white-theme-web
roast: white-theme-web crashes harder than my faith in humanity — 6 out of 10 attacks broke it. Ship it to prod, I dare you.

name: express
roast: express didn't just fail gracefully — it failed spectacularly, dramatically, and repeatedly. 7 attacks, 7 ways to ruin someone's day.

name: binary.kgec.tech
roast: binary.kgec.tech is less a 'live application' and more a 'live demonstration of how not to build a web service,' given it's missing basic security, doesn't even know what an API is, and has 0 stars to show for its efforts.
topFix: Implement Helmet.js in the server configuration to automatically add essential security headers like X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, and XSS Protection.

name: binary.kgec.tech
roast: binary.kgec.tech is less a live application and more a public security vulnerability demo, with its lax CORS policy and total disregard for security headers.
topFix: Implement a strict CORS policy using the `cors` package in Node.js, specifying allowed origins.

name: binary.kgec.tech
roast: binary.kgec.tech is a ghost in the machine, a silent, unsung, and utterly unprotected application, probably built yesterday and forgotten today.
topFix: Implement security headers using Helmet.js and configure X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy (CSP), and X-XSS-Protection.

name: express
roast: express is a security audit's worst nightmare — 3 security checks failed. Anyone with a browser and 10 minutes could ruin your day.
topFix: Add express-rate-limit: const limiter = rateLimit({ windowMs: 15*60*1000, max: 100 }); app.use(limiter)

name: CodeJudge-binary
roast: CodeJudge-binary, a project designed to brutally judge others, fails 6 out of 11 of its own quality checks before even leaving the starting gate, proving that those who live in glass houses shouldn't throw stones — especially when their glass house has no security middleware, input validation, or tests.
topFix: Implement a testing framework like Jest or Vitest and add unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for critical functionalities, as 'NO tests found'.

name: CodeJudge-binary
roast: CodeJudge-binary, a project designed to brutally judge others, fails 6 out of 11 of its *own* quality checks before even leaving the starting gate – that's some impressive self-sabotage.
topFix: Implement input validation: Integrate 'Joi' or 'Zod' to validate all incoming user input (GitHub URLs, live app URLs) before processing.

name: CodeJudge-binary

name: CodeJudge-binary
roast: CodeJudge-binary claims to expose project weaknesses, yet it's a security and quality dumpster fire itself, completely oblivious to its own glaring flaws.

name: resume-rejection-analyzer

name: Conflux-AI
roast: Conflux-AI, for a project daring to call itself an 'AI Studio app,' your critical security and reliability infrastructure is running on hopes and dreams, not code.
topFix: IMMEDIATE FIX: Remove the .env file from the repository, add it to .gitignore, and implement a secure environment variable management system like `dotenv-vault` or use platform-provided secrets management.

name: app.smolify.ai

topFix: Implement security headers using Helmet.js middleware, configuring 'X-Frame-Options', 'Content-Security-Policy', 'Strict-Transport-Security', and 'X-XSS-Protection'.
